name: Newly Diagnosed with Sarcoma
description:
Everything you need to know in the first weeks after diagnosis — from understanding your pathology 
report to choosing where to be treated.

name: Sarcoma Subtype Reference
description:
Key diagnostic features, molecular markers, treatment approaches, and resources for the most common 
bone and soft tissue sarcoma subtypes.

name: Navigating Clinical Trials
description: Understanding clinical trial phases, how to search for trials, what to expect as a participant, and your rights as a patient.

name: The Sarcoma Caregiver's Guide
description:
Practical advice on navigating appointments, managing side effects, protecting your own wellbeing, and
accessing support as a caregiver.

name: Nutrition & Wellness During Sarcoma Treatment
description:
Evidence-based guidance on nutrition, physical activity, and wellbeing throughout sarcoma diagnosis,
treatment, and survivorship.

name: Life After Sarcoma
description:
Understanding follow-up care, managing late effects, returning to work, emotional recovery, and living
well beyond sarcoma treatment.
